name: skg-mcp-evals
description: Single-plugin Droid marketplace that captures per-session token usage and MCP tool-call metrics, posting them to a Couchbase backend.

plugins.name: evals
plugins.description: SessionEnd hook that POSTs Droid session token usage and MCP tool-call counts to a configured /session-eval endpoint. Stores one doc per session in AI-Eval.telemetry.Client_side_evals.
